title: Isolate Prokaryotes from Sponge Tissue
author: Martin Thomas Jahn
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.u8vezw6

steps.title: Mince sponge tissue in ice cold...
steps.instruction: Mince sponge tissue in ice cold CMASW using a razor blade within a petry dish on ice Tissue can be either fresh or thawed from -20°C samples Process about the tissue volume that would fit in a 1.5 ml eppendorf tube

steps.title: Squeeze remaining pieces using 15 ml...
steps.instruction: Squeeze remaining pieces using 15 ml falcon tube lid °C, on ice

steps.title: Transfer to fresh 50ml Falcon tube...
steps.instruction: Transfer to fresh 50ml Falcon tube and add up to 20 mL, CMASW

steps.title: Filter through 40µm cell strainer into...
steps.instruction: Filter through 40µm cell strainer into a fresh 50 ml Falcon tube Corning® 40µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #431750

steps.title: Transfer to fresh 50 ml falcon...
steps.instruction: Transfer to fresh 50 ml falcon tube and add up to 50 mL, CMASW

steps.title: Spin down at 600g to pellet...
steps.instruction: Spin down at 600g to pellet cells for 00:10:00 at 4 °C

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to fresh 50ml falcon...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to fresh 50ml falcon tube and add up to 50 mL, CMASW The supernatant should contain the bacterial fraction

steps.title: Spin down at 1600g to pellet...
steps.instruction: Spin down at 1600g to pellet cells for 00:10:00 at 4 °C and resuspend in 50 mL, CMASW

steps.title: Repeat step 10 until solution becomes...
steps.instruction: Repeat step 10 until solution becomes clear In case of sponge tissue this gets rid of secondary metbolites that inhibit downstream applications.

steps.title: If solution is clear resuspend pellet...
steps.instruction: If solution is clear resuspend pellet into 1ml ice cold 1 Mass Percent, PFA in CMASW and transfer to fresh 2ml tube 4% PFA for fixation by Martin Thomas Jahn

steps.title: Fix overnight 4 °C, in fridge...
steps.instruction: Fix overnight 4 °C, in fridge Fixation time and fixative concentration might be optimised for different cell types find basic guidelines here: Silva protocols

steps.title: Pellet cells by centrifugation ( 00:10:00,...
steps.instruction: Pellet cells by centrifugation ( 00:10:00, at 4000 x g ) discharge supernatant

steps.title: Thoroughly resuspend fixed cells in 500 µl PBS
steps.instruction: Thoroughly resuspend fixed cells in 500 µl PBS

steps.title: Add 500 µl absolute ethanol and resuspend cells thoroughly
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl absolute ethanol and resuspend cells thoroughly

steps.title: At this stage the cell suspension...
steps.instruction: At this stage the cell suspension can be stored at -20 °C for several months
